summary: Reviewed the main...impl/gap-007 branch compare and changed files. No blocking correctness, GAP-007 DoD, test, or AGENTS.md Hard Rule issues found; local command execution was unavailable, so verification is based on source/doc review plus committed recorded evidence.
contract_items_verified: GAP-007 contract in docs/GAP_TASKS.md: gold.run now loads persisted Silver Parquet via persist.load_stats/load_news and supports --silver-root, --out, --counts-out, --ingest-date, --year-min, and --year-max.
gold.run.main(argv=None) returns the Gold output path after writing Parquet, and no longer logs a placeholder.

Counts writer moved to gold.build.write_gold_counts and records rows, columns, column_names, geo/year summaries, contains_AT/contains_HU, at_rows, and hu_rows; pipeline imports the same helper to preserve counts behavior.

Deterministic integration test tests/test_gold_load_from_silver.py persists fixture-derived Silver into tmp_path, invokes gold_run.main, reloads Gold, and verifies counts plus rail_passenger_km without network, MinIO, Ollama, Spark, or coursework data.

Docs/dashboard/progress sync for pipeline state change: docs/GAP_REGISTER.md, docs/TASKS.md, docs/index.html, docs/PROGRESS_LOG.md, .planning/COURSEWORK_PROGRESS.md, and the GAP-007 research/plan artifacts are updated.

AGENTS.md Hard Rules: raw Bronze code/data is not modified; numeric Gold processing remains deterministic with no LLM involvement; new Gold CLI defaults write under output/evidence; no fabricated live/Spark claims were introduced.
Recorded verification evidence reviewed: pytest -q -m integration, pytest -q, compileall, and a local CLI smoke are recorded in docs/PROGRESS_LOG.md and the GAP-007 research note.
